live_database_execution.reason: This shell has no local Supabase CLI or psql client available.

allowed_resolution_paths: Exact durable channel_listings.provider_listing_id scoped to external_account_id
Exact active channel_listing_aliases.alias_value scoped to external_account_id
disallowed_resolution_paths: Direct channel_listings.title matching unless the title is explicitly seeded as an alias
safety_contract.unmapped_visibility: provider_reservation_unmapped_imports view exposes unmapped listings, listings without active room mappings, and conflicting identity-vs-alias matches.

executable_sql_checks.name: insert an unknown listing title from a provider CSV row
sql: SELECT c.id AS channel_id, ea.id AS external_account_id
JOIN external_accounts ea ON ea.channel_id = c.id
channel_id, external_account_id, source_file, source_row_number, confirmation_code, raw_status,
guest_name, guest_contact, adult_count, child_count, infant_count, guest_count,
'Unknown Listing Title Not Seeded As Alias',
'Listing', 'Unknown Listing Title Not Seeded As Alias',
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, external_account_id, confirmation_code) DO UPDATE
executable_sql_checks.expected: The row is staged and retains the Earnings string only in raw_payload.

executable_sql_checks.name: resolve exact aliases and leave unknown alias unmapped
sql: SELECT confirmation_code, listing_alias_value, resolution_status, remediation_status, resolved_channel_listing_id, raw_payload ->> 'Earnings' AS raw_earnings
executable_sql_checks.expected: Returns TASK6-ALIAS-MISS with resolution_status='unmapped', remediation_status='unmapped_listing', resolved_channel_listing_id null, and raw_earnings='₫123,456'.

executable_sql_checks.name: prove the alias miss did not create false listing linkage or reservation import
sql: count(*) FILTER (WHERE resolved_channel_listing_id IS NOT NULL) AS false_listing_links,
count(*) FILTER (WHERE reservation_id IS NOT NULL OR resolution_status = 'imported') AS false_imports

executable_sql_checks.name: prove resolver has no fuzzy or direct title path
executable_sql_checks.expected: Function text joins channel_listings only on provider_listing_id and joins channel_listing_aliases on exact alias_value; it contains no ILIKE, similarity, or direct channel_listings.title equality.
